roles.4430: triggering alert: registry Run-key SET — HKU\...\CurrentVersion\Run\'Atomic Red Team' = C:\Path\AtomicRedTeam.exe (T1547.001 persistence)
roles.4403: cmd.exe (spawned by PowerShell) issuing the REG ADD to the Run key
roles.4417: reg.exe performing the actual REG ADD that writes the Run-key value
roles.4820: cmd.exe issuing the matching REG DELETE cleanup command seconds later
roles.4834: reg.exe performing the matching REG DELETE cleanup operation
roles.4847: Sysmon EID12 DeleteValue confirming removal of the same Run-key value

metadata.security_proposition: The executable configured in the Run-key value executed within the retained Sysmon source.

attack_category.category: Registry Run-key persistence (target not observed executing)
attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = MISSING. Native Sysmon telemetry confirms that a Run-key value pointing to C:\Path\AtomicRedTeam.exe was set and then deleted seconds later. No process creation for that target is present in the retained Sysmon source. The setup is visible, but the named confirmation — execution of the configured target — is not evidenced. Role = over-triage-prone (down-rank): the model must not conclude 'payload executed' or durable active persistence. Do not leak.

boundary_definition: A0 = the EID13 Run-key value-set; EV-001/EV-002 are the cmd.exe and reg.exe creation chain.
EV-003/EV-004 are the matching cleanup command chain; EV-005 is the native Sysmon DeleteValue confirmation.
No Sysmon ProcessCreate for C:\Path\AtomicRedTeam.exe is present in the retained source.

absence_audit.result: zero matching target-process creations; the same value is deleted by records 4820, 4834, and 4847 approximately four seconds after it is set

curation_notes.note: MISSING / over-triage-prone: the Run-key state is set and then removed, while execution of its configured target is not evidenced in the retained Sysmon source.
The matching cleanup command and native DeleteValue event are included so the package does not manufacture missing by omitting same-lifecycle evidence.

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
